action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including player stats, location, inventory, quest progress, and the world clock.

action_set_definitions.name: search_guidelines
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the operational guidelines or manuals for specific simulation modules to identify correct procedures for a perfect evaluation.

topic.description: The specific manual or topic to research (e.g., 'Restricted Area Rules').

example_output.guidelines: To achieve a perfect score in the Restricted Area module, the official must call a 'Block' on Situation A and a 'Charge' on Situation B...

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_location
action_set_definitions.description: Navigates the agent to a new spatial coordinate or region identifier within the simulation facility.

destination_id.description: The ID or name of the location to travel to.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_professional_focus
action_set_definitions.description: Performs actions (like meditation or review) to increase the agent's professional focus stat.

activity_type.description: The method used to increase focus.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_simulation_module
action_set_definitions.description: Starts a specific simulation module and processes a sequence of officiating decisions.

module_id.description: The identifier for the module to start.

decisions.description: A list of ruling decisions to apply during the simulation scenarios.

action_set_definitions.name: claim_and_update_status
action_set_definitions.description: Claims items from the environment or simulation rewards and updates quest flags.

item_to_claim.description: The name or ID of the item to add to inventory.

new_status.description: The new status string for the quest.

state_description.player_stats: Numerical attributes of the player character.
state_description.player_location: Current spatial coordinates and region identifier.
state_description.inventory: List of items currently held by the agent.
state_description.quest_progress: Dictionary of active quest IDs and their current completion status/stage.
state_description.world_clock: The current game time represented in ticks or minutes since start.
state_description.environment_flags: Boolean flags for unique world events or environmental changes triggered by actions.
